# virionData

The goal of virionData is to provide a consistent and ergonomic way to
access versions of the [VIRION data set stored in
Zenodo](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15643003).

This package allows users to select specific versions of the data set to
work with, provides easy access to metadata, and allows users to export
metadata.

The pipeline for creating virion can be found here:
<https://github.com/viralemergence/virion>

Python users can use
[py-virion-data](https://pypi.org/project/py-virion-data/).

## Installation

You can install the development version of virionData from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("viralemergence/virionData")
```

## Getting Started

See the [getting started
vignette](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/articles/virionData.html)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`batch_download_deposit_versions()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/batch_download_deposit_versions.md)
  : Batch download deposit versions
- [`deposit`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/deposit.md)
  : deposit
- [`deposit_summary()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/deposit_summary.md)
  : Simple summary data frame for the deposit
- [`download_deposit_version()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/download_deposit_version.md)
  : Download deposit version
- [`download_refresh()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/download_refresh.md)
  : Download or redownload data
- [`dummy_imports()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/dummy_imports.md)
  : Dummy function to pass RMD check
- [`export_deposit_bibtex()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/export_deposit_bibtex.md)
  : Get bibtex entry for a deposit.
- [`export_deposit_metadata()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/export_deposit_metadata.md)
  : Export Deposit Metadata in various formats
- [`get_all_versions()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/get_all_versions.md)
  : Get all deposit versions
- [`get_data_dictionary()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/get_data_dictionary.md)
  : Get Data Dictionary for a data Package
- [`get_individual_dictionary()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/get_individual_dictionary.md)
  : Get the dictionary for a single resource
- [`get_json()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/get_json.md)
  : Get json
- [`get_resource_name()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/get_resource_name.md)
  : Get the name of a resource
- [`get_version_citation()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/get_version_citation.md)
  : Get Version Citation
- [`get_versioned_data()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/get_versioned_data.md)
  : Get a specific version of the data
- [`list_deposit_versions()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/list_deposit_versions.md)
  : Get Versions of a Deposit on Zenodo
- [`make_url()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/make_url.md)
  : Make Zenodo URLs
- [`sanitize_id()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/sanitize_id.md)
  : Sanitize a zenodo id
- [`sanitize_version()`](https://viralemergence.github.io/virionData/reference/sanitize_version.md)
  : Check version ids
